reference: Hi, I am a forty-three-year-old female smoker and have been experiencing pains under my left breast. It does not occur all the time, but when it does, it stops me in my tracks. The pain lasts less than a minute. I think it may be stress, but heart problems run in my family, and I am a little concerned. Any ideas?
text: 彼女を飲み込むのが大きすぎるのではなくて、彼女は彼女を飲み込むのです。
